## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, plan holiday content, and align on 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Report:** A new report with 8+ highlights and a visual chart is due tomorrow, designed for easy LinkedIn sharing. Monthly deep-dive reports will follow.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** 11 articles were published to get ahead of the holiday break; no new content will publish the week of Dec 29.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**New Initiatives:** Exploring Reddit content repurposing and a paid backlink service. Pricing for the backlink service is requested, potentially for a trade-for-services arrangement.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** The next call will be a strategic session to align on Q1 goals. Katya will provide a guiding agenda for Alex and Ali to prepare.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**New Performance Report:** A new report is due tomorrow, designed for easy LinkedIn sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Content:** 8+ highlights from October publishing, plus a visual chart.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Goal:** Provide Understory with ready-to-use content to showcase growth and give GrowthX visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Monthly Deep-Dive Reports:** GrowthX will begin creating more detailed monthly performance reports.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Serve as another resource for Understory to pull data and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Blog Traffic:** GA4 data shows steady, upward traffic growth since October.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Metric:** 937 clicks since October.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Significance:** Steady growth is the key indicator of sustainable progress, more valuable than temporary spikes.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Content & Website Updates

  - [**Holiday Publishing Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
      - [**Recent Cadence:** 11 articles published since the last sync.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To get ahead of holiday team outages.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [**Pause:** No new content will publish the week of Dec 29.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Website Navigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [**Request:** A dropdown menu for blog categories (e.g., Paid Media, Rev Ops).](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [**Status:** A dev ticket is open.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [**ETA:** End of the first full week of January.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Author Bios:**](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Update:** Working to enable longer author bios in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Builds authority, which can indirectly aid SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### New Initiatives & Cross-Promotion

  - [**Reddit Content Repurposing:**](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

      - [**Status:** Understory is interested; Katya will provide a detailed plan.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

      - [**Rationale:** Builds site authority and improves SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya to provide pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Context:** Alex is discussing a trade-for-services arrangement with Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**YouTube Cross-Promotion:**](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Status:** Long-form YouTube content is delayed but expected by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Action:** Alex to share topic list for future article planning.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Podcast Transcripts:**](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [**Status:** Transcripts are current through the Lindy episode.](https://fathom.video/share/kci8x-yGHohqHY1ymPYHFKW49KrGgvYG?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
